summary: Frontend-only testing of /blog/refrigerator-water-filter page. All 22+ test cases passed across desktop and mobile viewports. Page renders correctly with Precision Craft design system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RefrigeratorWaterFilter blog page fully tested. All components render correctly: Hero, Quick Rule Banner (6mo/300/5min stats), TOC with 7 anchor links, 5 sign cards, brand table (LG/Samsung/GE/Whirlpool/Frigidaire), mid-CTA, 7 step cards, OEM vs Aftermarket comparison, dark checklist, FAQ accordion (5 items with open/close and chevron rotation), bottom CTA, author box with 'A' avatar, sticky sidebar (3 widgets), related services (3 cards), footer. Floating BOOK REPAIR button appears on desktop after scroll >300px. Mobile sticky bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US renders correctly. Design tokens verified: Montserrat font, #0D1B2A dark navy, #FF5722 orange accent, #F8F5F0 cream background. SEO meta tags and 4 JSON-LD schemas (Article, HowTo, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList) present. All phone links use tel:7605435733, all book links use /book?go=1.
